zh.lifeSummary: 當Pasquet De Bours於1125年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯布爾斯時，他的父親Louis de Bours de Bournonville23歲，母親Jehanne de Rollancourt18歲。他於1153年與Genevieve de Rely結婚。他去世於1187年享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bours
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Antoine, Cecile, Emile, Alcide, Anatole, Clovis, Ferrel, Leonce, Onile.

French: topographic name for someone who lived in a town as opposed to one who lived in a village, from Middle French bourg (Old French burc) ‘fortified town’, or a habitational name from (Le) Bourg, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Bourke , Bourque , Burk , and Burke .

History: Antoine Bourg/Bourque from Martaizé in Vienne, France, married Antoinette Landry in Acadia c. 1642. His descendants also bear altered forms of the surname, such as Bourke, Bourque, and Burk(e).

variants.name: Bourgeois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Emile, Alphonse, Armand, Camille, Gaston, Monique, Pierre, Lucien, Michel, Normand.

French: from bourgeois ‘burgher’ (from Old French burgeis, from burc ‘fortified town’), a status name for an inhabitant and (usually) freeman of a fortified town (see Bourg ). Compare Lebourgeois and also Boss , Burgess , and Bushway .
History: Jacques Bourgeois from France married Jeanne Trahan in Acadia c. 1643. Pierre Bourgeois from Poligny in Jura, France, married Marie-Louise Cléroux in Saint-Vincent-de-Paul, QC, in 1753.

variants.name: Bourke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Dermot, Liam, Murphy.
Irish: variant of   Burke  .
Americanized form of French   Bourg   or of its altered form   Bourque  .

variants.name: Bourget
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Jacques, Lucien, Pierre, Aime, Andre, Fernand, Germaine, Laurent, Ludger, Marcel, Marcell.
French: topographic name, a diminutive of   Bourg  , or a habitational name from (Le) Bourget, the name of several places in various parts of France.
Altered form of French Bourgeais, a variant of Bourgeois .

variants.name: Boulerice
meanings: Altered form of Breton Bourhis: from bourc'his ‘burgher’, a status name for an inhabitant and (usually) freeman of a fortified town (see Bourg , compare Bourgeois ).

variants.name: Bourque
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Pierre, Andre, Aurele, Camille, Emile, Fernand, Henri, Jacques, Marcel, Normand.
French (mainly Doubs): variant of   Bourg   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
History: The (majority of the) American bearers of the surname Bourque are descendants of Antoine Bourg/Bourque from France (see Bourg ).

nameMeanings.name: Pasquet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Philippe, Camille, Luc, Rejean, Aime, Alain, Alphonse, Armand, Camil, Cecile, Damien.
Altered form of French   Pasquier   ‘pasture’. Compare   Paquette   and   Parquette  .
French: from Old French pacquet ‘bundle (of faggots)’, a diminutive of paque ‘parcel’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a gatherer or seller of firewood or kindling.

variants.name: Pasquier
meanings: French: topographic name from Old French pasquier ‘pasture’, or a habitational name from (Le) Pasquier, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Paquet 1.

History: The surname Pasquier was brought to North America by several 17th-century (and also later) French settlers, including Isaac (also Étienne Isaac) Paquet/Pasquier dit Lavallée from Montaigu in Vendée, France (a son of Mathurin Pasquier), who married Élisabeth Meunier in Château-Richer, QC, in 1670. However, the descendants of the 17th-century settlers mostly bear altered forms of the surname, such as Paquet and Paquette.

variants.name: Parquette
meanings: Altered form of French Canadian   Paquet   1. Compare   Paquette   and   Perkett  .

variants.name: Paquette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Normand, Andre, Marcel, Armand, Cecile, Emile, Yvon, Adrien, Jacques, Adelard, Gilles.
Altered form of French Canadian and French Paquet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Parquette , Perkett , and Poquette .
French: from a variant of the female personal name   Paquet   3.

en.lifeSummary: When Pasquet De Bours was born in 1125, in Bours, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Louis de Bours de Bournonville, was 23 and his mother, Jehanne de Rollancourt, was 18. He married Genevieve de Rely in 1153. He died in 1187, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pasquet De Bours est né en 1125, à Bours, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Louis de Bours de Bournonville, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Jehanne de Rollancourt, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Genevieve de Rely en 1153. Il est décédé en 1187, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pasquet De Bours 1125 in Bours, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Louis de Bours de Bournonville 23 und seine Mutter Jehanne de Rollancourt 18. Er hat 1153 Genevieve de Rely geheiratet. Er starb 1187 im Alter von 62 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pasquet De Bours è nato il nel 1125 nel Bours, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Louis de Bours de Bournonville, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Jehanne de Rollancourt, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Genevieve de Rely nel 1153. Morì nel 1187, all'età di 62 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Pasquet De Bours(이)가 1125년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 부르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Louis de Bours de Bournonville(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Jehanne de Rollancourt(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1153년 Genevieve de Rely(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1187년 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pasquet De Bours nasceu em 1125, em Bours, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Louis de Bours de Bournonville, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Jehanne de Rollancourt, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Genevieve de Rely em 1153. Ele faleceu em 1187, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pasquet De Bours родился в 1125 г. в местности бурс, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Louis de Bours de Bournonville было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Jehanne de Rollancourt, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Genevieve de Rely в 1153 г. Он умер в 1187 г. в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pasquet De Bours nació en 1125, en Bours, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Louis de Bours de Bournonville, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Jehanne de Rollancourt, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Genevieve de Rely en 1153. Murió en 1187, a la edad de 62 años.
